title: Ability to specify order of Subitem summary labels colors
excerpt: The subject line pretty much says it all. It would be helpful if we were able to specify/change the order of the Subitem summary (in Parent item) labels/colors. For example, if there are three options Pending (red), In p…

posts.author: todddtaylor (Todd Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: The subject line pretty much says it all. It would be helpful if we were able to specify/change the order of the Subitem summary (in Parent item) labels/colors. For example, if there are three options Pending (red), In progress (yellow), and Done (green) which I would like to display in that order in the summary, but they appear as yellow-green-red. I have asked the staff at monday.com about this and they said there currently isn’t such an option to set the order. If someone has found a way to set the order (which seems to be independent from the order of my labels in the subitem list) I would be happy to learn of it. Otherwise, if you think this feature would also be useful, please vote. Thanks!

posts.author: jennbell (Jennifer Bell)
posts.cookedHtml: I also want to specify the order but I want them to be in the order the subitems are listed - our subitems are ordered - the first one should be done before the second one, etc. - but on the summary they seem to appear in a random order.
